title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Criminal Procedure (Identification) Act, 2022. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 4th August, 2022, vide notification No. S.O. 3653(E), dated 3rd August, 2022, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
